vpc_id.description: The ID of the AWS VPC kafka was deployed to

route53_zone_id.description: The ID of the DNS hosted zone that kafka uses

route53_node_zone_id.description: The ID of the DNS hosted zone that kafka nodes uses

route_table_id.description: The ID of the route table that belongs to kafka nodes

with.comment: Apply Run from GitHub Actions CI ${{ github.sha }}

steps.name: Install AWS CLI
steps.run:
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y unzip curl
curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip"
unzip awscliv2.zip
sudo ./aws/install --update
rm -rf awscliv2.zip aws

steps.name: Init the Kafka Cluster
steps.run:
# Store output
echo "vpc_id=$(terraform output -raw vpc_id)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
echo "route53_zone_id=$(terraform output -raw kafka_dns_id)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
echo "route53_node_zone_id=$(terraform output -raw kafka_node_dns_id)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
echo "vpc_cidr=$(terraform output -raw vpc_cidr_block)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
echo "route_table_id=$(terraform output -raw route_table_id)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

# For ECS Exec
sudo apt install -y expect

# Get variables for ecs command
cluster_name=$(terraform output -raw kafka_cluster_name)
service_name=$(terraform output -raw first_kafka_service)

# Move to ./post_queue
cd ../

# Get script files (encode in Base64 for special characters)
SCRIPT_B64=$(base64 -w 0 ./init.sh)

success=0
for i in $(seq 1 10); do
  echo "Trying to connect to Kafka cluster instances (Attempt $i/10)..."
  
  # Get Task ARN for one of the nodes in the cluster
  task_arn=$(aws ecs list-tasks \
    --cluster "$cluster_name" \
    --service-name "$service_name" \
    --desired-status RUNNING \
    --query 'taskArns[0]' --output text)
    
  echo "Target Task ARN: $task_arn"

  if [ "$task_arn" == "None" ] || [ -z "$task_arn" ]; then
    echo "No RUNNING task found yet. Retrying in 10 seconds..."
    sleep 10
    continue
  fi

  echo "Running Init Script..."
  EXEC_OUTPUT=$(unbuffer aws ecs execute-command \
      --cluster "$cluster_name" \
      --task "$task_arn" \
      --container "kafka" \
      --interactive \
      --command "sh -c '
      
        # Move needed files over
        echo $SCRIPT_B64 | base64 -d > /tmp/init.sh
        chmod +x /tmp/init.sh
        
        # Run
        /tmp/init.sh --is-started
        
        # Finish
        echo SUCCESS_TOKEN: Kafka initialized
        '" 2>&1) || true
  
  echo "$EXEC_OUTPUT"

  # Validate the actual container output
  if echo "$EXEC_OUTPUT" | grep -q "SUCCESS_TOKEN"; then
    echo "Kafka initialize successfully"
    success=1
    break
  elif echo "$EXEC_OUTPUT"; then
    echo "Connection failed or SSM tunnel not ready. Retrying in 10 seconds..."
    sleep 10
  fi
done

if [ $success -ne 1 ]; then
  echo "Failed to initialize cluster in 10 tries with ECS command, exiting"
  exit 1
fi
